    1. NormalTeacher()

Class NormalTeacher

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.BaseTeacher
logic.entity.NormalTeacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Moveable, Pursuer
public class NormalTeacher extends BaseTeacher implements Pursuer
A balanced chasing teacher that actively pursues the student.

Stats: 1 HP, moves every 4 ticks. Implements Pursuer for greedy-chase pathfinding toward the student.
